sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105915" key="tumpanw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυμπᾰνώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n105915.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drum-like, as of a drum,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἦχος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl></cit>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope> </bibl>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τυμπανοειδής.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
